items.p: NJPW star Shota Umino wants to put eyes on the company's prominence overseas when he defends his IWGP Global Heavyweight Championship at Forbidden Door.

items.h: Backstage Report On AEW's Creative Plans For Toni Storm Prior To Extended Absence
items.p: "Timeless" Toni Storm last competed in AEW at Revolution in March. She was taken out and left bloody on the following episode of "Dynamite".
